programme.title: Nikola Tesla - Waves Of The Future
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla, born in 1856 in what is now Croatia, was one of the world's greatest inventors. He developed numerous innovations in the field of electrical engineering and was granted over 280 patents, many of them in the USA.

programme.title: Operation Barbarossa - War Of Annihilation - Part 1: Summer
programme.desc: On 22 June 1941, the German Wehrmacht launched a war of aggression against the Soviet Union. Under the code name ‘Operation Barbarossa', the campaign aimed to bring the vast country in the east to its knees. Millions of people died as a result.

programme.title: He Plays For The Worst National Football Team On Earth: San Marino
programme.desc: What is it like to play for the worst national football team in the world? While everyone is watching the worldcup, we follow Nicola (26), the only full-time professional footballer in San Marino's national team, as he prepares for one of the biggest matches in the country's recent football history.

programme.title: From Popstar To Sanitation Advocate In Rural Ghana
programme.desc: Ghanaian singer Wiyaala returns home to the village of Funsi, using her fame to improve sanitation and bring better health to her community. Also: An artist in Mali is painting public buses to spread awareness about the climate crisis.

programme.title: Our Happy Days
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Problem Child In House
programme.desc: A collection of outrageous problems that you have never heard of! A great 'knowledge talk show' where problematic children who are struggling and fighting in the emotional rooftop room gain true wisdom about life and the world.

programme.title: The Seasons W
programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will 'get rid of all your worries and all your concerns.'

programme.title: Boss In The Mirror
programme.desc: A reality talk show that offers a candid and often humorous look at the workplace through the eyes of Korea's most outspoken bosses. Each episode follows prominent CEOs, entertainers, and professionals as they go about their daily routines and interact with their employees. Through real workplace situations, the show reveals the challenges of leadership, communication, and management.

programme.title: E410 - Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Farmer Zoe's animals get in the way of skate day, Rubble & Crew find a construction solution.

programme.title: E223 - The Crew Builds A Kangaroo Safari / The Crew Plays In The Construction Game
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a kangaroo safari for Lucas and Lily right in the Bark Yard... until their construction kangaroo hops away! // Speed Meister challenges Rubble & Crew to compete in the ultimate build-off: Builder Cove's first Construction Games!

programme.title: E121 - Greedyguts / Where Is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: E404 - Dojobot / A Shark's Life
programme.desc: Kai's Dojobot for training the Deer Squad is stolen by Baron Bite who turns it against them! // Lady Fluffpot spots a sea Monster whilst swimming at the beach!

programme.title: E211 - The Boat Pond
programme.desc: Peppa and her family and friends are playing at the pond with their toy boats. Everyone has a boat to play with except Rebecca Rabbit. Daddy Pig makes Rebecca a boat out of newspaper. Rebecca's paper boat is so nice; everyone wants one.

programme.title: E110 - Morning, Noon, And Night / Gaston's Visit
programme.desc: The Wise Old Elf teaches the elf children how to tell the time using a watch. Nanny Plum uses a dandelion clock to teach the fairy children. // Gaston's cave has a leaky roof, so Holly invites him to stay at the castle. But then Gaston takes over.

programme.title: E410 - Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Farmer Zoe's animals get in the way of skate day, Rubble & Crew find a construction solution.

programme.title: E124 - Barbazoo Can't Say ''no''
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy.

programme.title: E211 - The Boat Pond
programme.desc: Peppa and her family and friends are playing at the pond with their toy boats. Everyone has a boat to play with except Rebecca Rabbit. Daddy Pig makes Rebecca a boat out of newspaper. Rebecca's paper boat is so nice; everyone wants one.

programme.title: E613 - Pups Save A Runaway Mayor
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger creates robotic Pants to cheat at the Most Amazing Athlete Contest. They go haywire so Pups have to save runaway Mayor.

programme.title: E111 - The Crew & Marshall Build A Fire Station
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build Builder Cove's first ever Fire Station, complete with an inspection from Paw Patrol's Marshall! But when Speed Meister's sneaky sabotage traps Marshall's Fire Truck, the pups work together to put out a fire construction-style.

programme.title: E118 - Clock And Dance / Barbapileup
programme.desc: The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction. // Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: E121 - Greedyguts / Where Is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: E812 - Pups Save A Chicken Tulip / Pups Stop An Xtreme Shark
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger and his mother help Mayor Goodway look for a rare tulip, Humdinger's attempts to have his mom find the flower first gets them all in trouble. // The Pups must save Daring Danny X when a mechanical shark stunt that goes awry.

programme.title: E813 - Pups Save A Show Jumper / Pups Save The Salmon
programme.desc: Winnie Winnington goes looking for a frog to enter in a frog-jumping contest and ends up needing rescued in a swamp. // The pups must help salmon get to the ocean and also need to rescue Alex who gets stuck on top of a dam.

programme.title: E110 - Morning, Noon, And Night / Gaston's Visit
programme.desc: The Wise Old Elf teaches the elf children how to tell the time using a watch. Nanny Plum uses a dandelion clock to teach the fairy children. // Gaston's cave has a leaky roof, so Holly invites him to stay at the castle. But then Gaston takes over.

programme.title: E410 - Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Hadley is in danger of losing his hotel to Speed Meister unless Rubble & Crew can save the hotel with their construction skills!

programme.title: E410 - Rubble & Crew

programme.title: E313 - The Crew Builds A Mega Stunt Ramp / The Crew Builds A Solar Farm
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew use their giant trucks to make awesome stunt ramps when Speed Meister challenges Mayor Greatway to a stunt competition // When power problems shut down Sierra Sparkle's show, the pups hop in their big vehicles to turn the power back on.

programme.title: E846 - Please And Thank You
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa talk to Peppa and George about manners. Madame Gazelle teaches all the children about how wonderful it is to say please and thank you.

programme.title: E111 - A Trip To The Seaside / Ben's Birthday Card
programme.desc: Holly goes with Ben and his family to the seaside. No one packed lunch, so Holly uses magic to make some. // Holly has to make a birthday card for Ben by herself, without magic. When she gives him the card, she's embarrassed that it's hand-made.

programme.desc: The Sheriff's Office in DeRidder, Louisiana, receives a distressing phone call from the owner of Dee's Motel. The man tells them that he's found a woman dead in room 6.

programme.desc: A judge lashes out at a defence attorney who refers to his drunk driving client as a hero; a religious leader convicted of sexually abusing minors hears it from his victims; and more.

programme.title: E64
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Morning Call
programme.desc: Morning Call, anchored by Morgan Brennan, delivers the essential market intelligence that drives the trading day ahead. The program captures breaking business news as it unfolds and tracks pre market equity moves, commodity swings, U.S. futures, and overnight action across global markets.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.desc: The crew investigates a family-owned pizzeria in Magna, UT, that's been cursed by an evil witch.

programme.title: Now News
programme.desc: Professional anchors and frontline reporters deliver daily headlines, breaking news, local news as well as political development around the world.

programme.title: E17 - Surviving The Impossible
programme.desc: Humans can survive catastrophic injuries and deadly scenarios that defy the odds in ways that are inexplicable. Is cheating death when survival is seemingly impossible simply fate or good fortune?

programme.title: E6 - Outlandish Inventions
programme.desc: Picture this: a full-body gas mask for babies. How about Smell-o-Vision? Or a robot powered by eating slugs? These are all real inventions, and we've got them covered.

programme.title: E9 - Deep Space
programme.desc: While space has always been the final frontier, it's also been an unknowable one that every country has wanted to be first to conquer. Finally, newly released documents give us glimpses into their plans.

programme.title: E9 - Deep Space
programme.desc: While space has always been the final frontier, it's also been an unknowable one that every country has wanted to be first to conquer. Finally, newly released documents give us glimpses into their plans.

programme.title: E17 - Surviving The Impossible
programme.desc: Humans can survive catastrophic injuries and deadly scenarios that defy the odds in ways that are inexplicable. Is cheating death when survival is seemingly impossible simply fate or good fortune?

programme.title: E7 - Capybara's Pond
programme.desc: At the northern edge of the Pantanal, in one of the largest tropical wetlands on Earth, is a small pond that is home to an unusual family of rodents. They are not your typical rats or squirrels - these giants are the size of sheep!

programme.title: E5 - A Turtle's Legacy
programme.desc: The sea turtle is one of the oldest animals on earth. These ancient mariners even pre-date the dinosaurs. They have existed, relatively unchanged, for over 100 million years. But now, all seven of the surviving species are endangered.

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to an incredible diversity of plants and animals. But there are some here that remain unseen, lurking in the shadows and ready to strike at any time...

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.title: E7 - Capybara's Pond
programme.desc: At the northern edge of the Pantanal, in one of the largest tropical wetlands on Earth, is a small pond that is home to an unusual family of rodents. They are not your typical rats or squirrels - these giants are the size of sheep!

programme.title: E5 - A Turtle's Legacy
programme.desc: The sea turtle is one of the oldest animals on earth. These ancient mariners even pre-date the dinosaurs. They have existed, relatively unchanged, for over 100 million years. But now, all seven of the surviving species are endangered.

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts

programme.title: E7 - South America
programme.desc: From the Amazon to the Andes, South America has some beautiful scenery. From guanacos sparring over grassland, to marine iguanas head-butting over a beachhead, to home-stealing hermit crabs, the quest for real estate causes a lot of conflict.

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.title: E5 - Lion Daycare
programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: E3 - Walking with a Pangolin
programme.desc: Crush a busy day with the team as they release rehabbed pythons, teach a pangolin how to hunt, and round up a troop of vervet monkeys. Search for a missing bird of prey with Dr. Charlotte, while Dr. Amanda helps a bushpig savaged by poachers’ dogs.

programme.title: E4 - Tsiba's New Mum
programme.desc: Tackle an emergency when Dr. Amanda removes a sable antelope’s tracking collar, and see the animal-care team help a flea-riddled baby vervet monkey find a new mom. Free two orphaned serval cats and follow 20 yellow baboons into their new enclosure.

programme.title: E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.desc: Tackle an emergency when Dr. Amanda removes a sable antelope’s tracking collar, and see the animal-care team help a flea-riddled baby vervet monkey find a new mom. Free two orphaned serval cats and follow 20 yellow baboons into their new enclosure.

programme.title: E3 - Walking with a Pangolin
programme.desc: Crush a busy day with the team as they release rehabbed pythons, teach a pangolin how to hunt, and round up a troop of vervet monkeys. Search for a missing bird of prey with Dr. Charlotte, while Dr. Amanda helps a bushpig savaged by poachers’ dogs.

programme.title: E3 - Walking with a Pangolin
programme.desc: Crush a busy day with the team as they release rehabbed pythons, teach a pangolin how to hunt, and round up a troop of vervet monkeys. Search for a missing bird of prey with Dr. Charlotte, while Dr. Amanda helps a bushpig savaged by poachers’ dogs.

programme.title: E4 - Tsiba's New Mum
programme.desc: Tackle an emergency when Dr. Amanda removes a sable antelope’s tracking collar, and see the animal-care team help a flea-riddled baby vervet monkey find a new mom. Free two orphaned serval cats and follow 20 yellow baboons into their new enclosure.

programme.title: E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.title: E7 - Capybara's Pond
programme.desc: At the northern edge of the Pantanal, in one of the largest tropical wetlands on Earth, is a small pond that is home to an unusual family of rodents. They are not your typical rats or squirrels - these giants are the size of sheep!

programme.title: E7 - Capybara's Pond
programme.desc: At the northern edge of the Pantanal, in one of the largest tropical wetlands on Earth, is a small pond that is home to an unusual family of rodents. They are not your typical rats or squirrels - these giants are the size of sheep!

programme.title: E5 - A Turtle's Legacy
programme.desc: The sea turtle is one of the oldest animals on earth. These ancient mariners even pre-date the dinosaurs. They have existed, relatively unchanged, for over 100 million years. But now, all seven of the surviving species are endangered.

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to an incredible diversity of plants and animals. But there are some here that remain unseen, lurking in the shadows and ready to strike at any time...

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.title: E7 - Capybara's Pond
programme.desc: At the northern edge of the Pantanal, in one of the largest tropical wetlands on Earth, is a small pond that is home to an unusual family of rodents. They are not your typical rats or squirrels - these giants are the size of sheep!

programme.title: E7 - South America
programme.desc: From the Amazon to the Andes, South America has some beautiful scenery. From guanacos sparring over grassland, to marine iguanas head-butting over a beachhead, to home-stealing hermit crabs, the quest for real estate causes a lot of conflict.

programme.title: E5 - Beaux Beauxs at the Hobo Hilton
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don’t consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: E12 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.desc: The Bears find Chloe in the library, exhausted from studying for an exam all day. The Bears stay to help Chloe study, but make things worse in the process.

programme.title: E3 - Rigby's Body/Really Real Wrestling/Muscle Mentor/Caveman/Saving Time
programme.desc: When Rigby eats too much junk food, his body forces out his consciousness. Rigby, Mordecai and Skips set out on a quest to get it back before sunset.

programme.title: E29 - B. Nature/Salty Codgers/Knowledge/Love Monsters/Baby Hands
programme.desc: In order to get his powers back, Beast Boy returns to nature and finds it much harsher than he expects.

programme.title: E53 - Game Over/A Dog's Life/Birthday Bother/Bed Bean/Spa Day
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes obsessed with gaming after being introduced by Mrs. Wicket's nephew. He decides he must have his own console, only to discover how expensive they are.

programme.title: E15 - Good Mitch Spiking/Stilt Walkers
programme.desc: Muscle Man reveals his secret past.

programme.title: E412 - Them Jaws/Pool Shark
programme.desc: The Titans' day at the beach is interrupted by something vicious in the ocean.

programme.title: E15 - Good Mitch Spiking/Stilt Walkers
programme.desc: Muscle Man reveals his secret past.

programme.title: E88 - Mr. Greg/The New Lars/Beach City Drift
programme.desc: Steven, Greg and Pearl take a trip to Empire City to live the good life.

programme.desc: Mr Bean goes in search of wildlife but he isn’t expecting to see anything prehistoric!

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: The biggest headlines and most buzzworthy stories with live updates throughout the day.

programme.title: E386
programme.desc: Zain Asher and Bianna Golodryga cover the top global and national issues of the day.

programme.title: E124
programme.desc: The best of CNN's reporting from correspondents across the world, to guide global audiences through the fast-paced news cycle with insight, analysis and hard-hitting interviews.

programme.title: E126
programme.desc: Stay up to date with John Berman, Kate Bolduan and Sara Sidner from CNN's immersive news hub.

programme.title: E126
programme.desc: Daily sports show features major stories and issues making news in the world of sports.

programme.title: E239 - iSpace Out
programme.desc: A quirky billionaire asks Carly and her friends to put on the first live Web show from outer space, so they undergo tests for space travel. Meanwhile, a strange little girl visits Spencer at the loft.

programme.title: E249 - Sandy's Nutty Nieces / Insecurity Guards
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head when he volunteers to babysit Sandy's 3 nieces. // SpongeBob and Patrick volunteer as guards at the museum, while Squidward attempts to hang his painting unnoticed.

programme.title: E106 - The Heat is on / Dig disaster
programme.desc: It's the Chahuta's Chili eating contest, and soon it's revealed Marcel's a cheat. // When Hope takes Gran Gran's special ladle to the park to play it ends up at Professor Lopez's archaeological dig.

programme.title: E110 - Fair Share / Power Plant
programme.desc: Sharing isn't easy for the twins and after a particularly heated argument they decide split the treehouse in half. // In order to win a local gardening competition, Best attempts to grow a plant, and Bester decides to be a plant.

programme.title: E202 - Super Stars / Now Museum, Now You Don't
programme.desc: In an alternate universe, the Star family is a team of superheroes, or at least they think they are. // Cecil works a new temp job as a security guard at Lady Upturn's art museum.

programme.title: E106 - Sound of Silence / Space Invader
programme.desc: Lincoln buys a pair sound-canceling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. // After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night!

programme.title: E211 - Face/Off-Model
programme.desc: Squidina helps Patrick get back on-model.

programme.title: E613 - Crashed Course / Puns and Buns
programme.desc: The Loud siblings intervene when they think Lori is failing out of Fairway U. // Benny struggles to rein in Luan and her practical jokes when she becomes his coworker at the Burpin'Burger.

programme.title: E124 - Funny Business / Snow Bored
programme.desc: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant but starts hogging the spotlight. // The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

programme.title: E514 - My Dinner with Bigfoot
programme.desc: When the gang befriends Bigfoot in the woods, Kid Danger and Captain Man try to help get rid of a pesky hunter that's been trying to capture him.

programme.title: E300 - PL-1413 / In the Mood to Feud
programme.desc: Plankton travels two thousand years into the future and finds a few unfamiliar faces. // SpongeBob, Patrick, and Sandy find themselves in the middle of a long-standing feud between the Narwhals and the Planktons.

programme.title: E711 - Leave No Van Behind
programme.desc: When Vanzilla seems too broken down to ever drive again, Lana, Dad, and Gramps band together to fix her.

programme.title: E413 - Terror on Tape
programme.desc: The Stars watch a series of haunted video tapes.

programme.title: E613 - Crashed Course / Puns and Buns
programme.desc: The Loud siblings intervene when they think Lori is failing out of Fairway U. // Benny struggles to rein in Luan and her practical jokes when she becomes his coworker at the Burpin'Burger.

programme.title: E514 - My Dinner with Bigfoot
programme.desc: When the gang befriends Bigfoot in the woods, Kid Danger and Captain Man try to help get rid of a pesky hunter that's been trying to capture him.

programme.title: E106 - The Heat is on / Dig disaster
programme.desc: It's the Chahuta's Chili eating contest, and soon it's revealed Marcel's a cheat. // When Hope takes Gran Gran's special ladle to the park to play it ends up at Professor Lopez's archaeological dig.

programme.title: E202 - Super Stars / Now Museum, Now You Don't
programme.desc: In an alternate universe, the Star family is a team of superheroes, or at least they think they are. // Cecil works a new temp job as a security guard at Lady Upturn's art museum.

programme.title: Bloomberg Deals
programme.desc: A weekly program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the global market.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring you reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping today's complex economy.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Close
programme.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programme.title: The Pulse With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, finance and politics. We go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Next Africa
programme.desc: A monthly deep dive into Africa's biggest stories through a Bloomberg lens, discussing key steps taken to help deliver on Africa's quest of bridging the gap with global powers.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Having learnt where a hippos aggression comes from Steve wants to find out if we can live alongside the animal that kills up to 500 people a year. He visits St.Lucia, a town where hippos roam the streets freely at night, feeding on the manicured lawns and bushes of the townsfolk. In order to see them out of the water he must come back at night.

programme.title: E7 - Cuba
programme.desc: Alongside Cuban fishermen Robson searches for sardines, tarpons, bonefish, barracudas and grouper fish.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: A flood brings new challenges for the big cats; for the first time, the lion cubs experience water and the danger it brings.

programme.title: E1 - Sweden
programme.desc: Paddy and Chris head to Sweden to get back to nature and embody 'friluftsliv'. It can lower stress and improve mental health, but can they embrace nature to get the reboot needed?

programme.title: E6 - Bologna
programme.desc: Stanley Tucci explores Bologna, seen by many as the food capital of Italy. He breaks open a fresh cheese wheel with Massimo Bottura and meets the niece of Federico Fellini.

programme.title: E1 - Sweden
programme.desc: Paddy and Chris head to Sweden to get back to nature and embody 'friluftsliv'. It can lower stress and improve mental health, but can they embrace nature to get the reboot needed?

programme.title: E6 - Bologna

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Having learnt where a hippos aggression comes from Steve wants to find out if we can live alongside the animal that kills up to 500 people a year. He visits St.Lucia, a town where hippos roam the streets freely at night, feeding on the manicured lawns and bushes of the townsfolk. In order to see them out of the water he must come back at night.

programme.title: the Memorial Tournament presented by Workday
the Memorial Tournament presented by Workday
E5
programme.desc: 故事講述女主角韓苡茱撞見自己的老公鄭世赫與繼妹韓宥拉出軌後車禍身亡，再次醒來後竟回到四個月前準備試婚紗的時候。得知老公劈腿真相的她決定復仇，於是找上本來要與繼妹相親的徐道國展開聯姻，準備一場手撕綠茶繼妹的報仇計畫。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 資訊工程學系和模特兒系意外合併，燃起了一段閃耀的青春戀情。人氣網紅模特兒姜敏學和對愛情一無所知的優等生朱妍山，成為了新合併系的宣傳模特兒。他們個性上的碰撞，成就了一個溫馨爆笑的愛情故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: When we watch comedians on television, they often seem approachable and friendly. But have you ever wondered what their homes look like and how they're decorated? Today's theme is 'Comedians' Homes.'

programme.title: E9 - Big Flip Energy
programme.desc: House-flipping titan James takes on his toughest challenge yet. When his team finds a hoarder's nightmare with rotting walls, a sketchy layout and a collapsing roof, James is excited by the challenge.

programme.title: My Father's Murder In Greece
programme.desc: When Allie's father George takes her on a trip to Greece to discover her familial roots, George soon ends up murdered. Now Allie must uncover long-kept family secrets to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: To fight desertification, the Earth-Cleaning Bros start planting trees, but finding water and the right spot in endless sand is no easy task. Finally, they begin digging with high spirits.

programme.title: My Husband's Seven Wives
programme.desc: Alan's double life is exposed when his new bride Maggie meets Pam, who claims she's also married to Alan. The two women put jealousy aside and work together to put a stop to Alan.

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: Seven cooks design their own pressure test inspired by seven different Connoisseur ice cream flavours. The cooks of the best two dishes will win immunity.

programme.title: My Husband's Seven Wives
programme.desc: Alan's double life is exposed when his new bride Maggie meets Pam, who claims she's also married to Alan. The two women put jealousy aside and work together to put a stop to Alan.

programme.desc: House-flipping titan James takes on his toughest challenge yet. When his team finds a hoarder's nightmare with rotting walls, a sketchy layout and a collapsing roof, James is excited by the challenge.

programme.desc: In this episode, we'll break down how animals such as the mudskipper, gibbon, sunflower sea star, peacock spider, ibex, and more pull off such incredible acrobatics.

programme.title: E2 - The Biggest, Craziest Disasters!
programme.desc: Join Digley & Dazey as they face the biggest, craziest disasters! First, a big thunderstorm hits while the crew is working, & they have to rescue Scout after she gets trapped down a hole! Then, while working on a railway bridge, an earthquake causes it to almost fall apart, & the team must fix it before a train crosses! From escaping an avalanche they accidentally caused on a mountain to helping a baby lion that has escaped from the zoo, it's a day of big disasters!

programme.title: E2 - A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming & magical night with Twinkle the star! When Bao Bao struggles to sleep, Twinkle arrives & transforms into a hot air balloon to lift her cot into the night sky so she can see the moon. Then, she helps Max, Muffin & Bao Bao get ready for bed by transforming into a cuddly teddy bear to give them all warm goodnight hugs. From creating a magical rainbow over the bath to turning into a kite for a gentle ride, Twinkle always makes bedtime magical.

programme.title: E2 - Fin-tastic Pals & Fun Shapes
programme.desc: Join Ms. Appleberry & JJ as they meet the classroom goldfish, Flip, Flop & learn about shapes. Help an alligator learn to brush her teeth, quack & count like ducks then explore the letter G. Discover opposites like big & small with help from the Melon Learning Box & sing along to fun songs.

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E1 - Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: It's a day of crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! First, a friendly competition in the park turns into a wild go-kart race between Arpo & his rival, Nannybot! Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire. A toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably all over the backyard, & a malfunctioning birthday present massage chair chases him & Daniel around the house! From boomerang target practice to a building block showdown, the chaos never stops!

programme.title: E3 - What Will Cody Do Today?
programme.desc: What will Cody do today? Every day is a new adventure! He might move to a new house with his family & cat, Pickles. Or maybe he'll find a simple empty cardboard box & use his imagination to turn it into a turtle shell, a drum & a race car! He could go on a hike with JJ & race walnut sailboats, or stay home & sing the ABCs over a big pot of alphabet soup. With Cody, you never know what fun you'll have!

programme.title: E3 - Magic Pets Football Fun!
programme.desc: Join Morphle, Mila, and Jordie as they face off against the Magic Pets in a wild soccer match! With Incra and Telepup using their powers, Team Morphle will have to get creative to win the trophy. It’s a magical, winner-take-all game!

programme.title: The Conmen In Vegas
programme.desc: The story to after The Conman, where Dragon's sister Ching went to study in Canada. After King and Dragon defeated Macau Mon, they became swindling partners...

programme.title: She Shoots Straight
programme.desc: One by one, the Huangs died in the course of safeguarding law and order in Hong Kong. First, the father and then the two elder sons gave their lives in action. That leaves Tsung-pao, the youngest son, and four daughters. They are all police officers. What makes the mother prouder is Tsung-pao's marrying a senior policewoman Mina. Old Mrs. Huang is hoping to see a grandson to carry on the lawmen family tree. But the sisters don't like Mina. They make sure she does not have a good time. Mina suffers in silence. A raid on a Vietnamese gang was ordered. Tsung-pao and Mina to command. But sister Ling commits a serious mistake and the whole operation fails. Ling is suspended. She blames it on Mina...

programme.title: City On Fire
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat plays Ko Chow, a police undercover agent who is torn between his duty as a police officer and his loyalty to his friends on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: E9 - East Region 2: A Surprise For Dwayne
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host Dwayne Johnson. In these Eastern division battles we see Michelle Lewis go up against Dasha Kuret and Andrew Hanus take on Ryan Seenberg. They will compete on obstacles such as Launch Pad, Chain Linked, Kick Out and Over the Edge. Winners will move on to face reigning Titan’s on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.desc: Gaurav's world revolves around the superstar Aryan Khanna. What happens when his passion turns into a dangerous obsession that crosses the fine line? programme.title: Tanu Weds Manu

Rai Awards: National Film Award - Best Supporting ActreSS: Kangana RanautInternational Indian Film Academy Awards IIFA - Best Music Director: Krsna SoloIIFA - Best Lyricist: Rajshekhar Stardust Awards - Best ActreSSETC Bollywood BusineSS Awards - Most Profitable Actor

programme.title: Teri Baaton Mein Aisa Uljha Jiya
programme.desc: Aryan cannot find his ideal partner. He meets Sifra on a trip to the USA and falls in love with her, only to discover later that it is an impossible love affair. Release Year: 2024 Director: Amit Joshi, Aradhana Sah Awards: 23rd Zee Cine Awards: Kriti Sanon for SIFRA

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Jamie demonstrates how to stretch a tub of mince by making two dishes from it: meatball kebabs and crispy pork and homemade noodles. For a veggie option, Jamie makes an economy saving 'Veggie Puff Roll', and Karan Gokani demonstrates how to make a Cauliflower Curry using an airfyer.

programme.title: Million Dollar Buffet
programme.desc: The All You Eat Buffet takes a luxury turn. It's a brave new world of $10,000 sides of wagyu beef, foie-gras mac n cheese, Alaska king crab claws piled high and 20,000 gold leaf topped creme brulees.

programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. programme.desc: When friends play spin the bottle in a house marked by a massacre, they unleash an evil spirit and start dying in terrifying ways.

programme.desc: A group of friends is in a struggle for survival after discovering something deadly living among the ruins in the Mexican jungle.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: An intelligence agent is suspected of betraying the nation, forcing her agent husband to choose between loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: An intelligence agent is suspected of betraying the nation, forcing her agent husband to choose between loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: Mrs. K
programme.desc: Mrs. K is a housewife who lives in a quiet suburban neighborhood with her husband Mr. K and their daughter Lil' K. One day, a Macau ex-cop shows up to blackmail Mrs. K. He knows about her unseemly past. She agrees to his term and they meet. The deal goes sour as she attempts to get rid of him. He escapes and is captured by a stranger. After finding out why Ex-cop is mixed up in this, the stranger kills him. They are after Mrs. K for different reasons. Ex-cop is someone who stumbles upon Mrs. K's identity and decides to try his luck. The stranger, however, bears a grudge against Mrs. K. Things would date back more than ten years ago when a Macau casino was robbed. The robbery was carried out by a band of professionals and was led by none other than Mrs. K...

programme.title: The Case - Continuous Homicide
programme.desc: One night in Hong Kong, a clip of self-immolation began to go viral on the Internet. Before she died, the female deceased muttered words like she had hit an evil spirit. Then she picked up a lighter and lit it. Her whole body was on fire, and she screamed in pain. All the environmental evidence points to the teacher assisting others to commit suicide. The only thing is that he refused to admit murder, saying that he lost his memory...

programme.title: The Case - Limited Time Rescue
programme.desc: Police Force - Commercial Crime Bureau has been investigating Jufeng's finance for many years, but all failed due to insufficient evidence. In order to collect evidence, the Commercial Crime Bureau sent an informant to Jufeng. But when the informant successfully entered Jufeng Computer and stole the account, the immediate supervisor Sir Ren died mysteriously. Sir Chong started to take over the case...

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Dojo and May are a loving couple. Because Dojo has a brain tumor and needs 1 million baht for the operation, they decide to rob a money exchange store. Unluckily, the couple with 10 unfortunate patrons of the money exchange center are held hostages by 3 professional robbers on the same day. It is a robbery inside another robbery as well as some secrets among these people will be revealed. What could possibly happen when these people are trapped in the store with no way to escape?

programme.title: Awarapan
programme.desc: Shivam, a hitman, is asked to keep an eye on his boss's mistress. However, he soon learns that she has been a victim of sex trafficking and decides to unite her with her lover. Release Year: 2007 Director: Mohit Suri

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.desc: Yu-mi, a bestselling novelist, meets her new editor Soon-rok. With her Love Cell still asleep from heartbreak, his quiet charm stirs something new. Could he be her long awaited endgame?

E15
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 寧檬一直有一個成為投資總監的職業夢想，可畢業後做的工作卻與夢想相距甚遠。她的上司陸既明是一個業務能力極強的投資總裁，他不認為寧檬也能成為合格的投資人。某一天寧檬終於下定決心離開陸既明，向他也向自己證明她可以做到。寧檬重新求職，經過種種阻礙，機緣下最終進入了鷹石投資，開始了她的晉升之路。過程中陸既明也在關注着寧檬，起初他不認可，但在重要關頭還是會對寧檬進行提點，幫助她度過難關。陸既明長遠的投資理念使寧檬獲益匪淺，寧檬也改變了陸既明的處世態度。兩人互相影響，攜手並進，經歷了無數的波折和風浪之後，寧檬蜕變成為了獨當一面的金牌投資人，陸既明也歷練得更加成熟有擔當。他們認定彼此就是自己最正確的那個人。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E20
